name: check_url
description: Call BEFORE your agent fetches, visits, clicks, or passes any URL from an untrusted source (emails, scraped pages, user inputs, documents, API responses, or redirects). Uses Google Web Risk, Google Safe Browsing, RDAP domain age, SSL verification, and AI analysis. Returns SAFE/SUSPICIOUS/DANGEROUS verdict with trust_score (0-100), threat categories, and machine-readable agent_action.

arguments.name: url
arguments.description: The URL to check. Full URL preferred (e.g. https://example.com/path). Bare domains also accepted.
